tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Cricket is one of the most popular sports in the world played between two teams of eleven players using a bat and ball.

tab2.title: Format Types
tab2.content: Cricket has three major formats which include Test cricket, One Day International and T20.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Cricket is extremely popular in countries like India, Australia, England and Pakistan.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Football is the most popular sport in the world played between two teams trying to score goals using a ball.

tab2.title: Major Competitions
tab2.content: FIFA World Cup, UEFA Champions League and many domestic leagues.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Football is watched by billions of people worldwide.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Basketball is a fast paced sport played between two teams where players score by shooting the ball through the hoop.

tab2.title: Major Leagues
tab2.content: The NBA is the most famous basketball league in the world.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Basketball was invented in 1891 by James Naismith.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Tennis is a racket sport played individually or in pairs where players hit a ball across the net.

tab2.title: Major Tournaments
tab2.content: Grand Slam tournaments include Wimbledon, Australian Open, French Open and US Open.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Tennis is played professionally in many international tournaments.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Formula One is the highest level of international motor racing for single-seater formula racing cars.

tab2.title: Championship
tab2.content: Drivers compete across multiple Grand Prix races each season.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Formula 1 cars are among the fastest racing cars in the world.
